hero.badge: Senior Data Analyst / Data Engineer — Job 549347 · Contract
hero.description: Senior data analyst and engineer with fifteen years profiling, transforming, and reconciling large structured datasets from spreadsheets, CSV extracts, and warehouse sources. I execute repeatable transformation logic, document assumptions for audit review, and surface exceptions before outputs reach stakeholders. Contract work spans multi source file comparison, Python and SQL data handling, Excel based operational reporting, and governed quality control in regulated and industrial adjacent environments. Available immediately for remote contract work from northern Illinois.

highlights.label: Data profiling, data wrangling, data transformation, file comparison, reconciliation, data cleansing, data quality analysis, exception identification, technical documentation, Python, SQL, Excel, Power Query, repeatable processing, auditability, structured problem solving, validation, remote contract delivery

items.title: Senior Data Analysis and Transformation Specialist
items.organization: Regulated financial services enterprise, remote hybrid contract, Chief Data Office ecosystem
bullets: Profiled large structured datasets from multiple source extracts and documented field definitions, assumptions, and transformation logic for audit ready reuse.
Built extract comparison frameworks reconciling movement across periods and sources with exception reporting for stakeholder review.
Executed repeatable ELT transformations on Databricks with Python and SQL for governed analytical outputs.
Identified attribute shifts through statistical outlier detection before downstream teams relied on the data.

items.title: Data Integration and Reporting Analyst
items.organization: Global manufacturing group, regional finance leadership
bullets: Reconciled operational and financial datasets across spreadsheets and SQL sources for executive reporting cycles.
Automated KPI transformations with documented logic improving month end consistency and output quality review.

items.title: Contract Data Reconciliation and Validation Analyst
items.organization: Commercial banking and public sector financial systems, part time contract
bullets: Compared reporting outputs to source extracts, logged exceptions, and produced sign off documentation in regulated environments.

groups.title: Analysis
items: data profiling, file comparison, reconciliation, data cleansing, exception handling, validation, quality control, technical documentation, repeatable transformation logic
